name: omni-diffusion-generation
description: Generate text, images, video, and audio from a single unified diffusion model. Perfect for multimodal synthesis, cross-modal generation, synchronized content creation, and unified creative workflows. Stop juggling separate models—handle all modalities in one architecture. Ideal for podcast production, storyboarding, multimodal storytelling, and content automation that demands perfect synchronization.
paperTitle: Omni-Diffusion: Unified Multi-Modal Generation in a Single Architecture
